_comment: 上传参考音频克隆音色的示例 / Example: clone a voice from uploaded reference audio

experiment._comment: 修改 name 和 languages 即可建立独立模型 / Change name and languages to create an independent model
experiment.name: model_clone

generation._comment: 使用官方 qwen-tts 包提取并复用 voice clone prompt / Use the official qwen-tts package to build and reuse a voice clone prompt

voice._comment: reference_text 必须与录音逐字对应；仅 x_vector_only_mode=true 时可省略 / reference_text must exactly match the recording; omit it only when x_vector_only_mode=true
voice.speaker: voice_01
voice.reference_text: Replace this sentence with the exact transcript of the reference audio.

training._comment: 克隆音色建议先用较小学习率 / A smaller learning rate is recommended for cloned voices
